destination.description: Information about how to set the attribute, currently a accessPackageUserDirectoryAttributeStore type.

name.description: The name of the attribute in the end system. If the destination is accessPackageUserDirectoryAttributeStore, then a user property such as jobTitle or a directory schema extension for the user object type, such as extension2b676109c7c74ae2b41549205f1947edpersonalTitle.

source.description: Information about how to populate the attribute value when an accessPackageAssignmentRequest is being fulfilled, currently a accessPackageResourceAttributeQuestion type.
